sourceMovie.title: Heart Eyes
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Heart Eyes works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Heart Eyes clicked for you, 10 Things I Hate About You (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Heart Eyes?
faq.answer: Try 10 Things I Hate About You, The Apartment, About Fate—each shares DNA with Heart Eyes while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Heart Eyes?
faq.answer: Heart Eyes (2025) is best described as Horror, Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Heart Eyes worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
